calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-24-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Short Cause Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Kaquishka Turner, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC.
Witness, Tina Meki, sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant JOSHUA PAWLIK.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Rental Agreement is canceled. The lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 459 TURK STREET, ROOM #218, San Francisco, California 94102.

Damages $0
Holdover damages $0
Pre-judgment interest $0
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $0
For a Total Judgment of $0, possession only

Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Apr-24-2017 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-20-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Line 8
Judge Pro Tem: Nils Rosenquest, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic is present. Represented by Tino Meki
Attorney Kaquishka Turner for the plaintiff.
Defendant Joshua Pawlik is NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of April 24, 2017 remains on calendar. (501)
